What We Do

Getting Your People Home

24/7 Availability

Arrests don't wait for business hours. Neither do I. Call any time — day, night, weekend, or holiday.

Statewide Coverage

Based in Springfield, writing bonds throughout Missouri — with a primary focus on Greene, Christian, and surrounding Southwest Missouri counties.

Open Court Bonds

I write OC bonds — helping defendants who have an upcoming court date and need to get out ahead of it.

Fast, Personal Service

You'll speak to me directly — not a call center. I move fast because I know every hour behind bars matters.

Confidential & Discreet

Every case is handled with complete confidentiality. What you share with me stays between us.

Licensed Under Blue Moon

Operating under Rick Rikard's Blue Moon Bail Bonds — a trusted name in Springfield with a long record of results.

Bail is our business.  ·  Freedom is our mission.
